title: Snowwy Perfection
description: A compilation of Vanilla mods & packs to perfect the Minecraft experience without drifting too far from the feel of the base game and its good for pcs!
body:
**Key Features**: Drastically increased FPS, updated HUD and UI elements, Mob Animations, New Minecraft Dungeons inspired structures, QOL Updates, and much much more! (see Gallery tab for more insight!) 

You can join my own [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/XmPm9nbd3u) to help or suggest modes to add
